# IaC & Configuration Management

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Terraform | Advanced | ✅ Complete (16 modules) |
| Ansible & AWX | Advanced | 🔄 In Progress (9/16 modules) |

## Key Competencies

- Terraform modules for AKS/GKE provisioning (state management, workspaces)
- Infrastructure compliance validation (Checkov, tfsec)
- Ansible playbooks for build environment configuration
- AWX for centralized automation and RBAC-controlled execution
- Drift detection and infrastructure reconciliation
- IaC pipeline integration (plan → validate → apply)
